caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm sits in a recording studio. He wears a white t-shirt and over-the-ear headphones. In front of him is a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm; the arm features the text "Rode PSA1 Plus". The background consists of dark, vertically-ribbed acoustic foam panels. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks with an open mouth and gesticulates with his right hand, which moves upward and outward in a blurred motion of emphasis. His gaze remains fixed off-camera to his right. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip, capturing his upper body and the audio equipment in a close-up shot as he continues his animated delivery.
